summary: Frontend-only verification of the new language-aware PDF download flow (translated quote PDF via OpenAI) + OpenAI API key field in Ayarlar > E-Mail. All 6 acceptance steps passed end-to-end against the preview URL with DE default UI. Login admin@arigastro.com/admin123 -> /ayarlar -> switched to [data-testid=tab-email]: [data-testid=settings-openai-key] is present, type=password, contains a saved key (value_len=164 dots, starts with sk-), and Save (save-settings-btn) fires PUT /api/settings that returns success toast 'Einstellungen gespeichert'. Navigated to /teklifler and opened first existing quote /teklifler/6bb51376-3fd7-4430-8b60-e30f3c5879c7 (GM-202606-0002 for customer Esra Butik, 1 line item 'Özel Kalem' with 12 feature bullets). Verified [data-testid=download-pdf-btn] is now a DropdownMenuTrigger showing 'PDF herunterladen' + ChevronDown; clicking it opens a menu with exactly two items: [data-testid=download-pdf-tr] ('🇹🇷 Türkisch') and [data-testid=download-pdf-de] ('🇩🇪 Deutsch'). Clicked download-pdf-de: spinner (.animate-spin inside the trigger) appeared immediately -> POST /api/translate fired -> file 'Angebot-GM-202606-0002-DE.pdf' was downloaded by the browser -> spinner cleared after 3s. ZERO error toasts. Verified [data-testid=download-priceless-pdf-btn] is also a dropdown with [data-testid=download-priceless-tr] and [data-testid=download-priceless-de]. Clicked download-priceless-tr: spinner appeared on that button -> file 'Angebot-GM-202606-0002-TR-ohne-Preise.pdf' was downloaded -> spinner cleared after 3s. ZERO error toasts. End-to-end console error tally: 2 pre-login 401s from /api/auth/me probe (expected/harmless) and NO uncaught errors during the translate+download flows. Feature fully wired.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteView.jsx downloadTranslated() correctly sequences: (1) collectTexts flattens titles/descriptions/features/notes, (2) POST /translate, (3) applyTranslations into a JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(quote)) deep clone so state isn't mutated, (4) setTranslated(...) mounts the hidden QuotePDFTemplate at rootId='quote-pdf-root-translated', (5) 500ms delay for the template to paint before html2canvas. The 500ms wait is a magic number — for very large item lists with many tags this MAY be too short. Non-blocking here (waitForImages() is invoked inside generatePdf and covers late image loads).

Both dropdown menus disable the trigger only via `disabled={generating}` — that flag is shared across both TR and DE for both PDF and priceless PDF, so while ONE download is in flight the OTHER dropdown is also disabled. Good UX (prevents concurrent OpenAI calls). Confirmed via inspection.

The translate error path shows a toast built from t('quoteView.translateError') + (e.response?.data?.detail || e.message) — good; but if the backend returns a 500 with no detail, the toast may only show the prefix. Fine for now.

Settings.jsx renders the OpenAI key field under the E-Mail tab (line 238-242) inside a pt-4 border-t block AFTER signature. type='password' + font-mono + placeholder='sk-...' + i18n helper text openaiApiKeyHelp. Save uses the SAME single PUT /api/settings that persists the whole form object, so users don't need a separate save action for the key. Consistent with the rest of the settings.

Filename convention (Angebot-<no>-<LANG>.pdf and Angebot-<no>-<LANG>-ohne-Preise.pdf) is derived from i18n keys quoteView.pdfFilePrefix + quoteView.pricelessSuffix — nice German-first default naming that matches DE UI (verified in downloads: 'Angebot-GM-202606-0002-DE.pdf', 'Angebot-GM-202606-0002-TR-ohne-Preise.pdf').

Minor: on clicking download-pdf-de, the OpenAI translate call + PDF generation completed in ~3s for a quote with 1 item and 12 features. For quotes with many items this may take 10-30s; consider disabling the ENTIRE toolbar or showing a non-dismissable progress hint. Non-blocking; current spinner is adequate.

success_rate.backend: not tested (frontend-only per request; POST /api/translate confirmed working via previous curl and observed to trigger downloads in <3s)

seed_data_creation: None — reused existing quote GM-202606-0002 (Esra Butik). No test data created or removed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature testids on QuoteView: [data-testid=download-pdf-btn] (main dropdown trigger showing 'PDF herunterladen' in DE), [data-testid=download-pdf-tr] / [data-testid=download-pdf-de] (menu items with 🇹🇷/🇩🇪 flags), [data-testid=download-priceless-pdf-btn] (secondary dropdown 'Ohne Preise herunterladen'), [data-testid=download-priceless-tr] / [data-testid=download-priceless-de]. Spinner selector: '[data-testid=download-pdf-btn] .animate-spin' (Loader2 icon replaces the Download icon while generating=true). Settings OpenAI key: navigate to /ayarlar, click [data-testid=tab-email], field is [data-testid=settings-openai-key] type=password. Save button [data-testid=save-settings-btn]. Both dropdowns share the same `generating` flag so they're mutually disabled during any translate+download. Login testids: login-email-input / login-password-input / login-submit-button.
rca of the issue: N/A — new-feature acceptance run. Translation-based PDF download (POST /api/translate -> merge -> html2canvas hidden template -> jsPDF.save) and OpenAI settings field both work end-to-end. No regressions observed on adjacent quote toolbar actions (edit-quote-btn, print-btn, email-btn, whatsapp-btn, revise-btn, delete-quote-btn) or on settings save.
